Just now

--

Why finding a rental in Bangalore still feels broken in 2026.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Finding a flat in Bangalore shouldn’t take weeks.
If you’ve ever searched for a flat in Bangalore, you’ve probably experienced this.
You join Facebook groups.
Then another one.
Then WhatsApp groups.
Telegram.
Reddit.
Eventually you’re searching across 15–20 different places just to find one decent listing.
The process usually looks like this:

• A post says “2BHK available in Indiranagar.”

• The comments are full of “Interested.”

• You DM the owner.

• They don’t reply.

• Or the flat was rented three days ago.
You repeat this for hours.
After going through this myself, I wondered:
Why doesn’t one place simply organize all of these listings?
The problem isn’t the lack of listings.
